exact_command: RUSTC=$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/1.92.0-aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/rustc RUSTDOC=$HOME/.rustup/toolchains/1.92.0-aarch64-apple-darwin/bin/rustdoc rustup run 1.92.0 cargo test -p codec -p network -p node --target x86_64-apple-darwin --locked

covered: scalar/runtime byte and typed-error differential corpora
strict truncations, malformed bounds, replay, reorder, and redirect rejection
TCP and QUIC framing, authentication, priorities, and backpressure
durable packed execution, recovery, receipts, checkpoint-bound finality, and striped global ordering

limitations: Rosetta exposed no AVX2 or AVX-512 backend, so runtime selected scalar
this proves x86_64 wire/replay determinism, not x86 SIMD execution or performance
bare-metal x86 AVX2/AVX-512 cycles, branches, cache counters, throughput, and p99 remain required
